headline: Evaluating T-Mobile US (TMUS) Valuation After Mixed Recent Share Performance
summary: Recent share performance and what it might mean for investors T-Mobile US (TMUS) has drawn attention after a period of mixed share performance, with the stock up 0.6% over the past day but down over the past week, month, past 3 months, year to date, and year. Against that backdrop, investors are weighing the company’s current share price of US$178.10 against its recent financial profile. The company reported annual revenue of US$90.53b and net income of US$10.54b, alongside reported annual...
